focus: deep revisit - HTML/CSS sinks + generalization check

findingDetails.title: Report and preview renderers inject source-derived CSS token strings into style contexts without validation
findingDetails.claim: P1-006 generalizes beyond dark-mode swatches: report-gen.ts and preview-gen.ts interpolate source-derived typography, radius, and shadow token strings into inline CSS contexts without a CSS-value sanitizer or property-specific allowlist.
findingDetails.counterevidenceSought: Swept style, inline style block, href, and src sinks in report-gen.ts, preview-gen.ts, and proof.ts; normalized color and proof sinks were ruled out, but no CSS-context sanitizer or focused rendering test covered typography, radius, shadow, or dark-mode token values.
findingDetails.alternativeExplanation: Browser CSSOM usually normalizes computed styles, reducing likelihood for ordinary sites, but the code stores these values as strings and renders them into CSS contexts with HTML escaping or raw interpolation only.
findingDetails.downgradeTrigger: Downgrade to P2 if renderers validate CSS-derived values through property-specific allowlists or typed renderers, render unsafe values as escaped text-only, and add focused malicious-token tests.
findingDetails.scopeProof: Exact sink grep plus direct reads covered report-gen.ts, preview-gen.ts, proof.ts, token value types, Google Fonts link producer, and backend rendering tests.
findingDetails.recommendation: Add .opencode/skills/sk-design/design-md-generator/backend/scripts/render-safety.ts with property-specific CSS value helpers and route report-gen.ts, preview-gen.ts, and future proof CSS sinks through it.

reviewDepthApplicability.reason: Spec-folder review spans sk-design packet docs and md-generator backend renderers; this iteration focused on generated HTML/CSS sinks with security impact.

targetSelection.selectionReason: Prompt required a deep revisit of report/preview/proof HTML, CSS, href, and src sinks and whether P1-006 generalizes beyond dark-mode values.
discoveryMethods: exact grep for style, style block, href, and src sinks
producer read for token and Google Fonts values
omittedHighRiskTargets: live browser execution of generated malicious-token fixtures deferred
implementation of renderer sanitizer out of scope
targetSelection.semanticSearchStatus: not used; exact sink grep and direct reads were sufficient

searchLedger.rationale: Typography, radius, and shadow token strings reach style declarations without CSS-context validation across report and preview renderers.

searchActions.result: confirmed raw or HTML-escaped CSS token strings in style declarations

searchLedger.rationale: Proof style colors are hardcoded mappings or generated from numeric RGB, and screenshot src values are base64 buffers.
searchLedger.hypothesis: proof.ts may share the P1-006 CSS-derived style gap.
searchLedger.ruledOutReason: No source-derived arbitrary CSS string was found in proof style declarations.

searchActions.result: scoreColor hardcodes hex values; unmatched swatches derive hex from numeric RGB; screenshot src values are base64

searchLedger.rationale: Reviewed href/src sinks did not prove attribute breakout: href is HTML-escaped and screenshot src values are produced as base64.
searchLedger.hypothesis: href/src sinks may create a separate P1 from attribute breakout.
searchLedger.ruledOutReason: No unescaped quote-breaking href/src sink was confirmed in the reviewed files; Google Fonts host allowlisting remains hardening, not this P1.

searchActions.queryOrPath: href=|src= in target renderers plus googleFontsLinks producer
searchActions.result: report link href uses esc(l); proof/report screenshots use base64 strings from proof path

searchLedger.rationale: No new P2 was needed because P2-003 already records focused extraction/rendering test gaps; this iteration adds rendering-test evidence to that advisory.
searchLedger.hypothesis: Missing report/preview/proof CSS tests may be a new separate advisory.
searchLedger.ruledOutReason: The absence of rendering tests supports P1-008 and existing P2-003, but does not require a new distinct P2.

searchActions.result: no focused report/preview/proof rendering test hits

searchLedger.rationale: Code graph readiness is stale, so graph assertions were not trusted.
searchLedger.blockedReason: code_graph_status reported stale readiness and graphless fallback was used.
searchLedger.hypothesis: structural graph could supplement sink discovery.

title: Report and preview renderers inject source-derived CSS token strings into style contexts without validation

recommendation: Add render-safety.ts near the backend renderer scripts and route report-gen.ts, preview-gen.ts, and future proof CSS sinks through property-specific CSS helpers.

reason: proof.ts uses hardcoded score colors or numeric-derived swatch hex values, not arbitrary source-derived CSS strings in style declarations.
reviewed href/src sinks did not prove quote-breaking attribute injection; Google Fonts hrefs are HTML-escaped and screenshots are base64 from the proof path.
code_graph_status reported stale readiness; graphless fallback used.
